item.title: Codecamp OZ: A Nostalgic Dive Into The Archives of the Web
item.description: I often think how fascinating it would be if the entire World Wide Web disappeared, leaving only the Wayback Machine behind. It’s truly a remarkable tool and I could live with that. Today, while going down the internet rabbit hole, I rediscovered the long-lost website of Codecamp OZ on the Wayback Machine. Codecamp was this two-day event that began in 2005. I believe, its final gathering was in 2008. In Australia, April 25th is ANZAC Day, often part of a long weekend.
